data.title: Alexander’s Announces First Quarter Earnings Release Date and Vornado Realty Trust Quarterly Conference Call
data.description: Paramus, New Jersey - Alexander’s, Inc. disclosed plans to submit its Form 10-Q report for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This announcement, made on April 21, 2026, by the company listed on NYSE as ALX, also included the upcoming release of its first-quarter financial results on May 4, 2026. The earnings release is scheduled to be issued prior to the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on that day.

data.title: Vietnam's NDAChain Enables First Cross-Border On-Chain Transaction in Trust Infrastructure Milestone
data.description: A recent collaboration between Vietnam and Indonesia has showcased NDAChain's potential beyond being a blockchain infrastructure. Instead, it serves as a trustworthy layer for ensuring compliant and verified cross-border digital transactions. This proof-of-concept, announced in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam on April 22, 2026, highlighted the platform's capabilities. This development underscores the importance of NDAChain in facilitating secure and transparent digital transactions between nations.

data.title: Intel Stock Is Back: Agentic AI Is Filling Fabs And Fattening Margins
data.description: Intel Corp. stock, listed on NASDAQ as INTC, has experienced multiple setbacks in recent years but is now on an upward trajectory. Year-to-date, shares have surged by 86%. Analysts at BNP Paribas have upgraded Intel from Underperform to Neutral, increasing the price target from $34 to $60. Despite the current price of $68.50, there is still an anticipated 12% downside to the target price. The catalyst for this turnaround is the emergence of agentic AI, leading to a high demand for server CPU chips. This trend has resulted in rising chip prices and full fab capacity, ultimately boosting Intel's margins. BNP forecasts continued growth for Intel due to these factors.

data.title: GCG Telecom Solutions Rebrands as Electro Wire Telecom Solutions, the Trusted Name Behind High-Stakes Network Builds
data.description: Announcing its continued commitment to excellence in telecom and broadband infrastructure, GCG, a prominent distributor specializing in connectivity, power, automation, and supply chain solutions, unveiled its latest advancements on April 21, 2026 in Chicago. GCG emphasized its legacy of precision and efficiency in the industry.

data.title: Anythink Foundation Launches Summer Fundraising Campaign for Nature Library Programming
data.description: In Thornton, Colorado, the nonprofit organization Anythink Foundation, affiliated with Anythink Libraries in Adams County, initiated the Kinship Campaign for the summer. This campaign aims to raise $250,000 over three months to enhance programming and nature-based learning at Nature Library and all Anythink Libraries. The launch coincided with National Library Week and will include community-driven initiatives to support free nature-based programs.
